name: Barack Obama
subject: re: thank you note
body:
Where can I send you a thank you note? The Democratic PartyFriend --

Before I leave office, I'd like to send you something to make sure you know how grateful I am to have had you by my side over these past eight years.

**[What's the best place for me to send you a thank you note?](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Whats+the+best+place+for+me+to+send+you+&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo_nd&source=em_20161206_bo_nd")**

I will always appreciate how you've stood by me to fight for the change we believed in, to celebrate remarkable victories -- and to face down insurmountable obstacles, too. You've been a part of everything we've achieved during my time in office, and I know you'll continue to stand with our party and the movement we've built together for the fights ahead.

I hope you know how proud I am of you.

Sign up today so I can send you a note to say thanks:

**[http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpmydemocratsorgThankYouNote&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo_nd&source=em_20161206_bo_nd")**

Never forget what we did together.

Barack

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b7/4067b0a/222fa67bb/7e07cd9e/3136443897/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo_nd&source=em_20161206_bo_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b7/4067b0a/222fa67bb/7e07cd9f/3136443897/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo_nd&source=em_20161206_bo_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b7/4067b0a/222fa67bb/7e07cd9c/3136443897/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo_nd&source=em_20161206_bo_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b7/4067b0a/222fa67bb/7e07cd9d/3136443897/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo_nd&source=em_20161206_bo_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: CREDO Mobile Wins Major Privacy Fight for All of Us
body:
Dear Activist,

Our friends at CREDO Mobile just won a major legal battle to protect the privacy of all Americans, and we wanted to share this historic victory with you.

So if you're concerned about protecting your privacy under the Trump Administration, this might be the perfect time to switch your mobile phone service to CREDO Mobile (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/6/sf/r5cs/6Ldk0f/nMAvYCgDH>) .

Thanks for all you do!

Bob Fertik

Breaking News: We ́re fighting to protect your privacy
December 1, 2016

To our progressive community: This is something I ́ve wanted to tell you since I became CEO of CREDO but haven ́t been able to because of a gag order issued by the federal government. In 2013, CREDO received two National Security Letters from the FBI. We filed a lawsuit against the FBI challenging the constitutionality of National Security Letters or NSLs. NSLs are a tool the federal government can use to secretly demand information about our customers. The federal government forced us to remain silent about these requests and our fight against them with a gag order. For three long years, we have been forced to keep this lawsuit a secret.

Unlike other phone companies who profit by selling your information to the federal government, privacy is a core value for CREDO, and we will fight to defend it. We have run campaigns opposing the PATRIOT Act and other privacy-violating laws and funded a variety of groups who fought alongside us.

That’s also why in 2014 we became the first mobile phone company to issue a transparency report (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/s/sh/r5cs/6Ldk0f/sY3FzWYEwu>) and why we are the only phone company to earn a five-star rating last year from the Electronic Frontier Foundation (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/v/sT/r5cs/6Ldk0f/wXBnIYk1M>) for our policies protecting your data from government requests.

We owe a special thank you to the Electronic Frontier Foundation for representing us in this lawsuit, which ably and heroically fought in court to make sure we could exercise our First Amendment rights and talk about these NSLs with you.

You can read the press release further explaining this critical issue here (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/z/si/r5cs/6Ldk0f/vWjdN6NcwU>) .

I want to thank all of you for being a part of the CREDO family. Families fight to defend each other, and that ́s why we ́ve sued the government to protect your privacy rights.

By Ray Morris (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/U/so/r5cs/6Ldk0f/zg7IxiJrOa>) , CREDO Mobile's CEO.

Related posts:
At CREDO, your privacy is not for sale (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/j/sM/r5cs/6Ldk0f/67IU5ueE1z>) Transparency is a core value for CREDO (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/5/sh/r5cs/6Ldk0f/vy9K6vq7mq>) Another perfect 5 star rating for CREDO privacy policies (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/r/sg/r5cs/6Ldk0f/z1OroB3h77>)

(<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/Y/s9/r5cs/6Ldk0f/zvcQt7DD4A>) (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/e/sV/r5cs/6Ldk0f/zCmXzhjJGC>) (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/3/sc/r5cs/6Ldk0f/vvHt5G0rDx>) Questions? Send us an email (<sales@credomobile.com>) or write us at: 101 Market Street, Suite 700, San Francisco, CA 94105 View our privacy policy. (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/W/sX/r5cs/6Ldk0f/zvO0w6Lh5c>) ©2016 CREDO Mobile credomobile.com (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/x/sI/r5cs/6Ldk0f/Ursz1eqdNn>) | credoaction.com (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/d/R/r5cs/6Ldk0f/sGlFg1bHYS>) | workingassets.com (<http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/voPrh/S/sA/r5cs/6Ldk0f/fZqdpKntW>)
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTAwLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvNTUyOTI2MzU=

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Barack Obama
subject: Where should I send this note?
body:
Where can I send you a thank you note? The Democratic PartyFriend --

I always like to spend this time of year thinking through who and what I'm thankful for, and that's especially true this year.

When I think about our accomplishments -- rebuilding a strong economy that's helped millions of Americans find new jobs, making health care more affordable for those who need it, seeing our schools graduate students at record numbers -- I'm always conscious of the fact that I didn't do those things alone.

So this year, you're at the top of my list. And I want to send you a short note to thank you for being part of everything we've done in my two terms as president.

Will you let us know where to send it?

**[http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-Note1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+httpmydemocratsorgThankYouNote&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo2_nd&source=em_20161206_bo2_nd")**
Thanks for everything -- and don't forget to check your mailbox.

Barack

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b0/4067b0a/222a47b18/7e07b669/487374384/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo2_nd&source=em_20161206_bo2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b0/4067b0a/222a47b18/7e07b676/487374384/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo2_nd&source=em_20161206_bo2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b0/4067b0a/222a47b18/7e07b677/487374384/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo2_nd&source=em_20161206_bo2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c3b0/4067b0a/222a47b18/7e07b674/487374384/VEsD/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161206_bo2_nd&source=em_20161206_bo2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Team Inslee
subject: If we don’t act soon...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It could all go out the window. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTAwMDAyMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDUzODAyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend, Last month, the nation voted for a man who built his campaign on what divides us. Here in Washington, we voted for a different agenda: Increase the minimum wage, provide paid sick leave for every worker, and take common sense steps to reduce gun violence. We voted for better schools, cleaner air, and for a state that opens its doors and celebrates its diversity, because we know that our tolerance is our strength. We're proud of our diversity and we're proud of all the progress we have made, even in the face of the most shocking and disturbing political upset in US history. It's more important than ever that forward-looking states like Washington make clear we won't back down. We must act now if we want to keep our progress from being rolled back. **At mid night on Friday, December 9, we hit a state-mandated fundraising freeze. We must continue to strengthen our political organization before this legislative session, when our agenda is up against a Republican-controlled Senate and a Republican-controlled US government. Chip in $5 to help Jay's campaign protect and build upon our progressive accomplishments before it's too late:** [**Let 's build the progressive movement we need to stop Trump and Washington Republicans together -- chip in $5 today before our legally mandated fundraising freeze.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTAwMDAyMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDUzODAyMwS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDUzODAyMwS2&rt=0) Thanks for standing with Jay, Team Inslee | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTAwMDAyMzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDUzODAyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://www.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=10000239&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&j=MTA2MDUzODAyMwS2&l=5611360&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible.
---
All content (C) Jay Inslee for Washington, All Rights Reserved, 2016.
PO Box 21067
Seattle, WA 98111
[Privacy Policy](http://jayinslee.com/privacy) | | | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

We voted for better schools, cleaner air, and for a state that opens its doors and celebrates its diversity, because we know that our tolerance is our strength. We're proud of our diversity and we're proud of all the progress we have made, even in the face of the most shocking and disturbing political upset in US history. name: DSCC Breaking News
subject: ❌ Paul Ryan, Donald Trump, and Tom Price ❌
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Paul Ryan and Senate Republicans are working fast to slash Americans' access to healthcare. Let's make it clear that their attempts to damage healthcare are unacceptable. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee36/2b07114c/43d8ca56/7365cbd7/406243556/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-medicare?source=PT-20161206-Breaking-ProsHV")
---
_**BREAKING: "PAUL RYAN IS DETERMINED TO KILL MEDICARE" (LA Times)**_
[**Not on our watch! Sign here to protect healthcare! >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee36/2b07114c/43d8ca56/7365cbd7/406243556/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-medicare?source=PT-20161206-Breaking-ProsHV")
This is bad, Friend!

First, Donald Trump nominated Tom Price, who the _New York Times_ called a "radical choice for health secretary." Then, just days later, Paul Ryan initiated a dangerous plan to gut Medicare THIS YEAR - threatening to ratchet up costs for 45 million seniors who rely on it!

[**Now we have to respond ASAP! Add your name to help Senate Democrats oppose Price and reject the GOP 's healthcare attacks.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee36/2b07114c/43d8ca56/7365cbd7/406243556/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-medicare?source=PT-20161206-Breaking-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Protect Healthcare** : [**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee36/2b07114c/43d8ca56/7365cbd7/406243556/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-medicare?source=PT-20161206-Breaking-ProsHV")
Tom Price doesn't just have it out for Medicare, Friend. He's also focused on: ➜ STRIPPING Planned Parenthood of all federal funding and launching an all-out attack on a woman's right to choose
➜ REPEALING Obamacare and leaving millions of Americans without health coverage - not to mention curtailing access to birth control and maternity care
➜ SLASHING Medicaid by more than 30% and stripping insurance from at least 14 million Americans We can't stand for this. With Republicans working fast to undermine healthcare at every turn, it's on us to step up and fight like hell.**[Friend, sign now to make it clear that ANY attempt to damage healthcare is unacceptable >> ](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee36/2b07114c/43d8ca56/7365cbd7/406243556/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-medicare?source=PT-20161206-Breaking-ProsHV")**

Thank you for taking action,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-medicare?refcode=DPE-20161206-Breaking-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee36/2b07114c/43d8ca56/7365cbd1/406243556/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: [Add your name] We're with Planned Parenthood
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76c0/24c69fd9/2289bbd/18eff531/2351695099/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all&source=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all")
---

Peter,

Anti-choice groups are gearing up to celebrate a big victory:

Republicans are already plotting to defund Planned Parenthood in the next Congress, and they actually have a good shot at doing it.

We're not going to let that happen.

Our 60 pro-choice women in the House and 15 women in the Senate are going to stand up to Republicans and fight for women. And they need all of us to raise our voices to tell Republicans that we're not about to let them gut one of our nation's largest providers of health care.

**[Add your name to tell Republicans we are standing with Planned Parenthood today-- and always.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76c0/24c69fd9/2289bbd/18eff532/2351695099/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161206_email_StandWithPP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+to+tell+Republicans+we+are&utm_campaign=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all&source=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all")**

Let's be clear: One out of three women have said they struggled to afford birth control at some point. From breast cancer screenings to preventive care, Planned Parenthood is, for millions of women and men, a critical health care provider.

This is what Republicans want to eliminate.

Women's health and safety are at risk.

And that's why we have to fight this with everything we've got.

**Add your name if you're still standing with Planned Parenthood:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Still-With-PP](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76c0/24c69fd9/2289bbd/18eff533/2351695099/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/s/20161206_email_StandWithPP?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStillWithPP&utm_campaign=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all&source=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all")**

Thank you,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76c0/24c69fd9/2289bbd/18eff52c/2351695099/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all&source=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76c0/24c69fd9/2289bbd/18eff52d/2351695099/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all&source=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76c0/24c69fd9/2289bbd/18eff52e/2351695099/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all&source=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c76c0/24c69fd9/2289bbd/18eff52f/2351695099/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all&source=WPENEX04N_digital_email_20161206_StandWithPP_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Team Trump Michigan
subject: President-Elect Trump Needs Your Help
body:
Peter:

The Berrien County Board of Canvassers will participate in the recount TOMORROW and the President-Elect needs your help immediately to ensure that it is fair and accurate.

We need you to volunteer! You can sign up at [migop.org/recount](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fmigop.org%2Frecount&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mi_recount_05a&n=1 "http://migop.org/recount") or call 1-866-677-5413.

What: Berrien County Board of Canvassers Recount
When: TOMORROW (Wednesday)
Where: South County Building (1205 N Front Street, Niles)

Thank you for your continued support. Volunteer to ensure that Hillary Clinton and her allies don't steal this election!

-Team Trump Michigan

Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mi_recount_05a&n=2).
